allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); cd "C:\\Users\\Hojiakbar\\Desktop\\HOTEL BRON SYSTEM\\frontend"; npm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/rooms" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "BODY: $\($r.Content.Substring\(0,200\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "XATO: $_" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 15; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4200" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Angular tayyor! STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Hali yuklanmoqda... \($\($_.Exception.Message\)\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4200" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Angular tayyor! STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Hali yuklanmoqda yoki xato: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($maxWait = 60; $waited = 0; do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $waited += 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4200" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "✅ Angular tayyor! \(${waited}s\) STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; break } catch { Write-Host "${waited}s — hali yuklanmoqda..." } } while \($waited -lt $maxWait\))
